elections.note: Certified final 261,652 ballots cast (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Stats by County: precinct 119,543 + VBM 142,109; 63.79% of 410,188 registered). Pre-adoption, precinct-based. Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: Fresno's live GEMS results page (www2.co.fresno.ca.us/2850/Results/Results20121106.htm) has NO Wayback capture in the Nov 6-10, 2012 window (verified by CDX, --noproxy); only the post-canvass final file was archived (years later). The modern fresnocountyca.gov dated-summary-report system that yields an archived election-night report did not exist until 2020. No news quote of an end-of-night county total located. Value left null per definition (never substitute a different denominator).

Certified final 163,420 ballots cast (CA SoS; precinct 64,901 + VBM 98,519; 39.24% of 416,433 registered). Pre-adoption, precinct-based. Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: no Wayback capture of Fresno's live results page in the Nov 4-8, 2014 window (CDX verified); the earliest archived per-election file (Results-2014-11-04.pdf) is a late-canvass version, not the end-of-night plateau. The archivable dated-summary-report system (fresnocountyca.gov) began in 2020. No election-night news total found. Null per definition.

Certified final 291,890 ballots cast (CA SoS; election-day 131,787 + VBM 160,103; 66.73% of 437,423 registered). Pre-adoption, precinct-based. Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: Fresno's live GEMS election-night page (www2.co.fresno.ca.us/2850/Results/Results20161108.htm) has ZERO Wayback captures in the Nov 8-12, 2016 window (CDX verified); the only archived copies of that file are 2024 re-crawls of the final canvass. The archivable dated-summary-report system began in 2020. No clean end-of-night county ballot total found in news. Null per definition.

Certified final 256,972 ballots cast (CA SoS; election-day 93,581 + VBM 163,391; 56.24% of 456,891 registered). Pre-adoption, precinct-based (last midterm before VCA/e-pollbook/ASV in 2020). Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: no Wayback capture of Fresno's live results page in the Nov 6-10, 2018 window (CDX verified, both co.fresno.ca.us and fresnocountyca.gov). Only news proxy is ABC30 (abc30.com/fresno-county-elections-ballots-counting-votes/4642191/) reporting 'more than 100,000 ballots still need to be counted' (76,000 VBM + 24,000 provisional) a DAY+ after Election Day -- a day-after running total, not the election-night plateau, and late VBM kept arriving -- so it does not yield a valid plateau numerator. Null per definition.

Certified final 221,419 ballots cast (CA SoS; in-person 28,343 + VBM 193,076; 44.28% of 500,076 registered). Post-adoption (VCA vote centers + DFM/EIMS e-pollbooks + automated signature verification, all from 2020). Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: Wayback has ZERO fresnocountyca.gov captures in the entire Nov 8-16, 2022 window (CDX verified, --noproxy), so Fresno's live results page and its dated election-night summary report were never archived; the only archived 2022-general summary reports are the zero report (70588) and the Dec-8 FINAL canvass report (71142-electionsummaryreportrpt12082022_final.pdf) -- neither is an election-night plateau. Fresnoland (Nov 8-9, 2022) gave only a wrong-denominator framing ('~30% of total eligible voters') and a day-after running total ('about 41,000 ballots yet to be counted Wednesday morning'), neither a clean end-of-night ballots-counted figure. Null per definition. (Confound note: had a plateau been recoverable, Fresno's 2020 VCA all-mail/vote-center model independently front-loads ballots into the pre-Election-Day mail batch, so a post-2020 jump could not be attributed to e-pollbooks/ASV alone.)

Election-night PLATEAU = 206,372 ballots ('Voters Cast: 206,372 of 511,349', 40.36% of registered), from Fresno County's OFFICIAL 'Election Summary Report' dated/internally timestamped 11/6/2024 12:30:26 AM with Precincts Reported 478 of 478 (100.00%) -- the LAST election-night update (file electionsummaryreportrpt_11_5_24_1231.pdf, saved ~12:31 AM), recovered as a Wayback-archived PDF (capture 2024-11-07 00:36 UTC) and read with pdftotext (PRIMARY). This is the night's plateau, not the 8 p.m. first tranche: ABC30 (the v2 source) describes a first 8 p.m. wave of ~150,000 early VBM, then three updates through the night as officials 'worked past midnight to tabulate nearly all the ballots voters cast in person' -- the 12:30 AM 100%-precinct report (206,372) is that end-of-night cumulative (early VBM + virtually all election-day in-person). It HELD through Nov 6 before the multi-day canvass resumed: the next archived report (electionsummaryreportrpt11_7_24.pdf, 11/7/2024 3:28 PM) jumped to 222,324, and the count climbed to the certified 330,932 (in-person 63,049 + VBM 267,883) by Dec 3 -- the ~110k gap is the ~100,000 VBM dropped at vote centers/drop boxes on Election Day plus provisionals that were still unprocessed (per registrar James Kus). 206,372 / 330,932 = 62.36%. Post-epollbook AND post-ASV (both adopted 2020). NB: had v2's 8 p.m. ~150,000 first-tranche figure been used it would give a wrong ~45.3%; the correct plateau metric is 62.36%.

notes: Definition: election-night % = ballots in Fresno County's LAST election-night Election Summary Report (the cumulative 'Voters Cast' total that plateaus late on election night with 100% of precincts reported and holds through the next day, before the multi-day canvass resumes) / CA SoS certified final ballots cast (Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County). Covers the November generals 2012, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2022, 2024 that bracket Fresno's 2020 adoption of electronic pollbooks (DFM/EIMS vote-center check-in) and automated signature verification; the 2020 general is deliberately EXCLUDED as a COVID early-voting outlier. DENOMINATORS are PRIMARY and solid for all six (CA SoS SOV participation tables). NUMERATOR is recoverable for only ONE election: 2024 (206,372 @ 12:30 AM, 100% precincts, PRIMARY) from Fresno's archived dated Election Summary Report PDF (the modern fresnocountyca.gov /files/sharedassets/.../electionsummaryreportrpt_<date>.pdf system; election-night and canvass versions for the 2024 general were both captured by Wayback and read with pdftotext -- WebFetch is blocked for web.archive.org but curl/CDX with --noproxy and direct PDF download are not). 2012/2014/2016/2018 have NO election-night plateau source: Fresno's pre-2020 live GEMS results page (www2.co.fresno.ca.us/2850/Results/) was never captured by Wayback at an election-night timestamp (only post-canvass finals survive), and the archivable dated-summary-report system did not begin until 2020. 2022 likewise has no election-night source: Wayback captured zero fresnocountyca.gov pages in the Nov 8-16, 2022 window, so the live results page and its election-night summary report were never archived (only the zero report and the Dec-8 final canvass report exist), and news gave only wrong-denominator/day-after framings. ADOPTION: e-pollbooks 2020, ASV 2020 -- so 2012-2018 are PRE both, 2022/2024 POST both. Only ONE post-adoption value is sourceable (2024 presidential = 62.36%, which exceeds SF's ~57% calibration for 2024) and NO pre-adoption value is sourceable, so a clean pre/post election-night comparison cannot be made for Fresno from archived first-report data; CONFOUND: Fresno's e-pollbook/ASV adoption (2020) coincided with the Voter's Choice Act all-mail/vote-center rollout, which independently front-loads ballots into the pre-Election-Day mail batch.
